omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may use or allow third-party services (such as advertising networks and analytics tools) to collect anonymous information. This may include general device information, app usage data, and region/language settings. The purpose of this data collection is to display relevant advertisements, measure app performance, and improve our services.

We do not sell or trade your personal information to third parties. However, we may share data with: • Service providers (ads, analytics, crash reporting) for operational purposes. • Legal authorities if required by law or to protect our rights.
